ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
workshopid = nil
permissionMin = -1

----
permissionCode = nil
objScript = nil
objPosition = nil
gameid = nil
host_name = nil
host_id = nil
save_min = -1
saveCount = 0
function onLoad()
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    self.setLock(true)
    for _, hostPlayer in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if hostPlayer.host == true then
            host_name = hostPlayer.steam_name
            host_id = hostPlayer.steam_id
            break
        end
    end
    if workshopid == nil then
        self.interactable = true
        self.setScale({1.0, 1.0, 1.0})
        self.setColorTint({0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5})
    else
        gameid = workshopid..'-'..dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..'-'..dt.hour..'-'..dt.min..'-'..dt.sec
        self.interactable = false
        self.setScale({0.01, 0.01, 0.01})
        self.setColorTint({0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0})
    end
end

function onPlayerConnect(player)
    if workshopid ~= nil then
        postConnectLog(player)
    end
end

function onSave()
    if save_min == -1 and workshopid ~= nil then
        postOpenLog()
    end
    postSaveLog()
end

function postOpenLog()
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..' '..dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.host == true then
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/add_open_log.php', 
            {['Opener_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Opener_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Open_Time']=dts, 
             ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
        elseif player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or 
        player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or 
        player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then
            postConnectLog(player)
        end
    end
    for _, spectator in ipairs(Player.getSpectators()) do
        if spectator.host == true then
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/add_open_log.php', 
            {['Opener_Name']=spectator.steam_name, ['Opener_SteamID']=spectator.steam_id, ['Open_Time']=dts, 
             ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
        else
            postConnectLog(spectator)
        end
    end
end

function postPlayLog(player)
    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/add_play_log_v1.php', 
    {['Permission_Code']=permissionCode, ['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, 
    ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
end

function postConnectLog(player)
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..' '..dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/add_join_log.php', 
    {['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Join_Time']=dts, ['Game_ID']=gameid,
     ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Host_Name']=host_name, ['Host_SteamID']=host_id})
end

function postSaveLog()
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    if save_min ~= dt.min then
        WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/add_save_log.php', 
        {['Opener_SteamID']=host_id, ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Save_Time']=dts})
        save_min = dt.min

        if saveCount < permissionMin then
            saveCount = saveCount + 1
        elseif saveCount > permissionMin then
            return
        elseif saveCount == permissionMin then
            saveCount = permissionMin + 1
            for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
                if player.host == true then
                elseif player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or 
                player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or 
                player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then
                    postPlayLog(player)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function setPermissionCode(string)
    permissionCode = string
end
